option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" tools:context=".Activity.ChatActivity">
<!-- Top App Bar --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardAppBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="64dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivBack" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_centerVertical="true" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="@color/text_main" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:text="AI Study Chat" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
</RelativeLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Quick AI Task Buttons --> <HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/hsvQuickActions" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingVertical="12dp" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:scrollbars="none" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/cardAppBar">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Exam Questions Button --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipExamQuestions" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Action" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Exam Questions" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipIcon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_help" app:chipIconTint="@color/primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<!-- Summarize Button --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipSummarize" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Action" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Summarize" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipIcon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_sort_by_size" app:chipIconTint="@color/primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<!-- Short Notes Button --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipShortNotes" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Action" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Short Notes" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipIcon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" app:chipIconTint="@color/primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
</LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<!-- Chat Messages RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvChat" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingBottom="16dp" android:clipToPadding="false" app:layoutManager="androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/layoutInput" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/hsvQuickActions" tools:listitem="@layout/item_chat_message" />
<!-- Chat Input Area --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutInput" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/card_bg" android:elevation="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<EditText android:id="@+id/etMessage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/bg_input_field" android:hint="Type your message..." android:maxLines="4" android:padding="12dp" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSend" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.Icon" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="24dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_send" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconTint="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" tools:context=".Activity.ChatActivity">
<!-- Top App Bar --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardAppBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="64dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivBack" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_centerVertical="true" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="@color/text_main" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:text="AI Study Chat" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
</RelativeLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Study Mode Selector --> <HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/hsvStudyModes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingVertical="8dp" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:scrollbars="none" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/cardAppBar">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipExplain" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Explain" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipShortNotesMode" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Short Notes" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipExamAnswer" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Exam Answer" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipQuiz" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Quiz" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipFlashcards" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Flashcards" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
</LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<!-- Quick AI Task Buttons --> <HorizontalScrollView android:id="@+id/hsvQuickActions" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingVertical="12dp" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:scrollbars="none" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/hsvStudyModes">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Exam Questions Button --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipExamQuestions" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Action" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Exam Questions" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipIcon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_help" app:chipIconTint="@color/primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<!-- Summarize Button --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipSummarize" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Action" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="Summarize" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipIcon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_sort_by_size" app:chipIconTint="@color/primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
<!-- Short Notes Button --> <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipShortNotes" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Action" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Short Notes" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/primary_light" app:chipIcon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" app:chipIconTint="@color/primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="0dp" android:textColor="@color/primary" />
</LinearLayout> </HorizontalScrollView>
<!-- Chat Messages RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvChat" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingBottom="16dp" android:clipToPadding="false" app:layoutManager="androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/layoutInput" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/hsvQuickActions" tools:listitem="@layout/item_chat_message" />
<!-- Chat Input Area --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutInput" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/card_bg" android:elevation="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<EditText android:id="@+id/etMessage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/bg_input_field" android:hint="Type your message..." android:maxLines="4" android:padding="12dp" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSend" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.Icon" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="24dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_send" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconTint="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="1dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="14sp" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="1dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="14sp" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipGroupSuggestions" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" app:chipSpacing="4dp" app:singleLine="false" />
</LinearLayout>
